name: Warfarin bleeding-risk screen
risk: Warfarin has high harm potential when interacting drugs or bleeding symptoms are present.
safety_action: Bleeding symptoms or very high INR require urgent clinician assessment; do not advise self-adjustment without prescriber guidance.
urgency_changers: Melena, hematemesis, hematuria, severe headache, syncope, hypotension, or active major bleeding.
pharmacist_traps: A recent normal INR does not exclude a delayed interaction after a newly started medicine.
